nodes.name: ddl.sql
nodes.summary: NexMark benchmark DDL that creates Kafka source tables and convenience views (`bid`, `auction`, `person`) over the NexMark event stream.

nodes.summary: NexMark q0 benchmark query with temporal filter: a passthrough query over recent bids within a time window.

nodes.name: q0.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Drops the q0 NexMark materialized view after benchmark completion.

nodes.name: q0.sql
nodes.summary: NexMark q0 benchmark query: a passthrough query that measures baseline streaming throughput with no aggregation.

nodes.summary: NexMark q1 benchmark query with temporal filter: currency conversion on bid prices within a sliding time window.

nodes.summary: Drops the q1 NexMark materialized view after benchmark completion.

nodes.name: q1.sql
nodes.summary: NexMark q1 benchmark query: converts bid prices from USD to EUR using a streaming projection.

nodes.summary: NexMark q10 benchmark query with temporal filter: logs all bids to a side table within a time window.

nodes.summary: Drops the q10 NexMark materialized view after benchmark completion.

nodes.name: q10.sql
nodes.summary: NexMark q10 benchmark query: logs all bids including their auction and bidder IDs to measure throughput of append-only sinks.

nodes.summary: NexMark q101 benchmark query: computes total bid amount per auction, joining bids with auctions.
